title: Pilot jurisdiction Duties & Roles content (cited, expert-reviewed)
context: The Duties & Roles faculty (task 010) needs jurisdiction-specific content: a structured, primary-source-cited representation of the pilot jurisdiction office's statutory duties, oath, and powers. This content is HIGH risk-tier; it must be sourced to primary law from the approved source dataset (task 009) and reviewed and signed off by a credentialed expert before shipping. No content ships without expert sign-off.
objective: Draft the pilot jurisdiction Duties & Roles content -- structured, primary-source-cited duties, oath, and powers -- sourced entirely from the approved source dataset and reviewed and signed off by a credentialed government-ethics expert before shipping.
acceptanceCriteria: Every duty, oath, and power claim is cited to a primary source from the approved source dataset (task 009); no claim is unsourced
Structured format matches the Duties & Roles faculty (task 010) data model
Content is non-partisan; no political framing or optics language
Labeled informational, not legal advice throughout
Credentialed expert (government-ethics professional and/or licensed attorney for the jurisdiction) reviews and signs off; sign-off recorded before content ships
The minimal grounded-vs-blank-slate kill-gate (eval-029), re-run on this real cited content, still shows grounded+cited ahead -- otherwise M3 does not begin
output: A reviewed, expert-signed-off document containing the pilot jurisdiction Duties & Roles content (duties, oath, powers) fully cited to primary sources, ready to load into the Imprint layer for the Duties & Roles faculty.
